title: Microsoft Purview DSPM for AI lab configuration
description: Declarative scope and cadence for the Wave 3b read-only DSPM-for-AI posture verifier (scripts/Test-DSPMforAIPosture.ps1). Per ADR 0022 Microsoft Learn documents no programmatic authoring API for DSPM for AI; this file therefore omits a `policies:` field and is a scope descriptor only. References: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/dspm-for-ai, docs/adr/0022-dspm-for-ai-authoring-surface.md.

scope.description: Inputs the verifier iterates: which labels, which Copilot workloads, and which AI role groups are in scope.

labels.description: Sensitivity labels source. Default source is data-plane/information-protection/labels.yaml (Wave 1).

sources.description: Repo-relative paths to upstream desired-state label YAMLs.

oneOf.description: Include every label the upstream YAMLs produce.
Include only the named labels (by displayName).

workloads.description: Copilot surfaces the lab scopes for DSPM-for-AI posture reporting. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/dspm-for-ai

roleGroups.description: Microsoft Purview portal role groups required for DSPM-for-AI administration. Operators populate this list from https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/purview/ai-microsoft-purview-permissions; an empty array is permitted (no-op check). Each entry must match a role group already managed by scripts/Deploy-PurviewRoleGroups.ps1.

posture.description: Posture-check cadence knob. The actual schedule, when one ships, will live in a GitHub Actions workflow; this field is a human-readable contract anchor.

cadence.description: Primary cadence label. ADR 0022 selects 'weekly' to mirror Wave 3a (ADR 0021 Decision 1).
